# harness-kit

Project-agnostic AI agent harness with stage orchestration, bounded loops, and MCP context tools.

## Capability taxonomy
- Autonomy tier: bounded
- Recovery tier: resumable
- Simplicity tier: slightly complex
- Tags: mcp, memory, workflow, evals, provider-agnostic, cli, typescript, tool-discovery

## Intent profiles
- turnkey-coding: profile=turnkey-coding; keywords=turnkey coding, ship feature, coding agent, implement feature, build feature
- multi-agent-orchestration: profile=multi-agent-orchestration; keywords=multi-agent, orchestration, handoff, coordination, agent workflow
- drop-in-memory: profile=drop-in-memory; keywords=memory layer, persistent memory, session memory, recall, knowledge memory

## MCP tool discovery
- Tool count: 20
- graph-status: tags=mcp, analysis
- graph-neighbors: tags=mcp, analysis
- graph-dependents: tags=mcp, analysis
- graph-path: tags=mcp, analysis
- graph-layers: tags=mcp, analysis
- graph-layer: tags=mcp, analysis
- graph-hubs: tags=mcp, analysis
- memory-list: tags=mcp, memory
- memory-read: tags=mcp, memory
- memory-search: tags=mcp, memory
- memory-link-status: tags=mcp, memory
- memory-link-search: tags=mcp, memory
- vector-status: tags=mcp, rag, tool-discovery
- vector-index: tags=mcp, rag, tool-discovery
- vector-search: tags=mcp, rag, tool-discovery
- harness-loops: tags=mcp, workflow
- harness-report: tags=mcp, workflow
- harness-catalog: tags=mcp, workflow
- harness-pick-profile: tags=mcp, workflow
- harness-tool-discover: tags=mcp, workflow, tool-discovery

## Notes
- Use `npm run harness:profile -- --task "<task>" --json` to map a task to an intent profile.
- Use `npm run harness:mcp -- harness-tool-discover --intent <intent>` for on-demand tool routing.
